name: Mako Mining Corp.
summary: Mako Mining Corp., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of mineral properties in Nicaragua. The company primarily explores for gold and silver deposits. Its primary asset is the San Albino-Murra Property, a development stage property located in Nueva Segovia, Nicaragua. The company was formerly known as Golden Reign Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Mako Mining Corp. in November 2018. Mako Mining Corp. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
